ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or region */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the country or region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country or region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country or region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country or region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country or region in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country or region */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country or region */,
  "country_flag" TEXT /* URL or path to the country's flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  "region_flag" TEXT /* URL or path to the region's flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Primary source of the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or region the data entry belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data entry is for */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator for the given year */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the month */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (0-1) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source's website */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for automated data retrieval */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Regions or countries covered by the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entry_sources" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_retrieval_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last retrieved from the source */,
  "data_retrieval_method" TEXT /* Method used to retrieve the data (e.g., manual, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entry_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., UTF-8, ASCII) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., UTF-8, ASCII) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., economist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., comment, correction) */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the license belongs to */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Text of the license */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the license becomes effective */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL to the license text */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "license_status" TEXT /* Status of the license (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_licenses_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)
